'''languju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iambus|iambus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iambus|iambus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| languju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:længijith|længijith]] || [[word:længijij|længijij]] || [[word:længijish|længijish]] || [[word:længiji|længiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:langungujuth|langungujuth]] || [[word:langungujuj|langungujuj]] || [[word:langungujush|langungujush]] || [[word:langunguju|langunguju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:langujuth|langujuth]] || [[word:langujuj|langujuj]] || [[word:langujush|langujush]] || [[word:languju|languju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:langufjuth|langufjuth]] || [[word:langufjuj|langufjuj]] || [[word:langufjush|langufjush]] || [[word:langufjuf|langufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:langujuthu|langujuthu]] || [[word:langujuju|langujuju]] || [[word:langujushu|langujushu]] || [[word:langujuku|langujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:langujuth|langujuth]] || [[word:langujuj|langujuj]] || [[word:langujush|langujush]] || [[word:languju|languju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:langujuthul|langujuthul]] || [[word:langujujul|langujujul]] || [[word:langujushul|langujushul]] || [[word:langujukul|langujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:langujuthuthu|langujuthuthu]] || [[word:langujujuju|langujujuju]] || [[word:langujushushu|langujushushu]] || [[word:langujuku|langujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:langujuthun|langujuthun]] || [[word:langujujun|langujujun]] || [[word:langujushun|langujushun]] || [[word:langujukun|langujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:langujuthuoro|langujuthuoro]] || [[word:langujujuoro|langujujuoro]] || [[word:langujushuoro|langujushuoro]] || [[word:langujukuoro|langujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
